name: Curried Vegetables & Garbanzo Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes and cut into 1-inch chunks.
2. Drain and rinse the garbanzo beans.
3. Sauté the onion, bell pepper, and garlic in the sherry over medium heat until onions are translucent.
4. Add water, tomato paste, cayenne pepper, curry powder, salt, potato chunks, and garbanzo beans to the pot.
5. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 25 minutes, loosely covered.
6. Stir in frozen peas and continue to simmer another 5 minutes until vegetables are tender.
7. Serve over rice and top with sliced green onions. Applesauce is a good side dish with this.
